mapper.insert: INSERT INTO exams(student_id, start_time, status) VALUES(#{studentId}, NOW(), #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE exams SET status = 'finished', submit_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{examId}
mapper.select: SELECT q.id AS questionId, q.content, q.option_a, q.option_b, q.option_c, q.option_d, q.answer AS correctAnswer, eq.student_answer AS studentAnswer FROM exam_questions eq JOIN questions q ON eq.question_id = q.id WHERE eq.exam_id = #{examId} ORDER BY q.id
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM exam_questions eq JOIN questions q ON eq.question_id = q.id WHERE eq.exam_id = #{examId} AND eq.student_answer = q.answer
